faq_articles.question: What is your 30-day money-back guarantee?
faq_articles.answer:
We want you to feel confident getting started with your work-from-home business. That’s why we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all core programs and starter plans.

Here’s how it works:
- The 30-day period begins on the date of your purchase.
- If you decide the program isn’t right for you within those 30 days, contact our support team and request a refund.
- We may ask a few brief questions about your experience so we can improve, but your refund is not conditional on completing any specific assignments.
- Refunds are typically processed within 5–7 business days back to your original payment method.

Exceptions:
- One-on-one coaching sessions that have already been delivered are non-refundable.
- Any third-party tools, software, or services you purchase outside of our platform are not covered.

If you still have questions or want to confirm whether a specific plan is covered, use the "Contact support" link below and our billing team will be happy to help.

faq_articles.question: How do I get started with the work-from-home program?
faq_articles.answer:
You can get started in three simple steps:

1. Choose a starter plan on the Plans & Pricing page that matches your budget and support needs.
2. Complete the short application so we can understand your goals and recommended track.
3. Check your email for login details and follow the "Week 1" onboarding checklist.

Most members complete onboarding in under 60 minutes and book their first coaching session within the first week.

faq_articles.question: How do refunds and cancellations work?
faq_articles.answer:
You can cancel any recurring subscription from your account settings at any time. When you cancel, you will retain access until the end of your current billing period.

If you are within the 30-day money-back guarantee window for an eligible purchase, you may request a refund by contacting support and including your order number. Once approved, refunds are typically processed within 5–7 business days.

Please note that any bonuses, templates, or downloads you’ve already redeemed may not be available after a refund is issued.

faq_articles.question: What are the technical requirements to join?
faq_articles.answer:
You’ll need a reliable internet connection, a modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge), and a device with audio and video capability for live sessions (laptop, desktop, or tablet).

Our learning portal is mobile-friendly for viewing lessons, but we recommend a laptop or desktop for implementation work and coaching calls.

faq_articles.question: What’s the difference between plans and programs?
faq_articles.answer:
Plans determine how you access our platform (level of support, coaching, and tools), while programs are the specific business tracks you follow, such as Email Marketing or Affiliate Sales.

You can start with any plan and then choose one or more programs inside your dashboard. Higher-tier plans typically include more one-on-one coaching and additional live group sessions for your chosen program.

webinars.title: Work-From-Home Getting Started Overview
webinars.subtitle: How to launch your first income stream in the next 30 days
webinars.description: In this introductory overview, we’ll walk through the core building blocks of a simple work-from-home business, show real-world examples, and outline a 30-day action plan you can follow.

webinars.title: Introductory Overview: Earning Your First $500 From Home
webinars.subtitle: A simple path for beginners with limited time
webinars.description: Learn the key steps to earning your first $500 online, including choosing a profitable idea, getting your first leads, and avoiding common beginner mistakes.

webinars.title: Getting Started Overview: Part-Time Path to $2K/Month
webinars.subtitle: Build a part-time friendly business from home
webinars.description: This webinar is ideal if you can only commit 10–20 hours per week. We’ll show you a realistic path to $2k/month with examples from real students.

webinars.title: Introductory Overview: Email-First Business Model
webinars.subtitle: Why email is still the most reliable channel for beginners
webinars.description: Discover how to build a lean email-first business: what to send, how often, and how to turn subscribers into paying clients.

webinars.title: Advanced Training: Scaling Beyond $5K/Month
webinars.subtitle: Systems and strategies for established earners
webinars.description: For those already earning consistently, this training covers scaling offers, traffic, and team without burning out.

webinars.title: Live Q&A Session: Overcoming Getting-Started Roadblocks
webinars.subtitle: Bring your questions and get live feedback
webinars.description: An open Q&A session for prospective and new students. Ask anything about picking a niche, offers, or tech setup.

webinars.title: Case Study Session: From Side Hustle to $4K/Month
webinars.subtitle: Breakdown of a real student’s journey
webinars.description: We’ll unpack a full case study: what they sold, how they marketed it, and how they managed their time alongside a job.

webinars.title: Introductory Overview: Is This Right For You?
webinars.subtitle: Replay-eligible overview session
webinars.description: A high-level overview of our methodology and who tends to get the best results in our programs.

webinars.title: Morning Intro: Work-From-Home Foundations
webinars.subtitle: For early birds and European time zones
webinars.description: A morning-friendly session covering the same core foundations as our evening overview, with extra time for questions.

webinars.title: Late-Night Q&A for Night Owls
webinars.subtitle: Ask anything about getting started
webinars.description: A casual, late-night Q&A for those in non-US time zones or who prefer to join after work.

success_stories.title: From Naptime Experiments to a Steady $2,700/Month
success_stories.headline: Busy mom of two builds an email-based side business working 22–28 hours per week
success_stories.summary: Lena, a former teacher and mom of two, used the Email Freedom Builder program and the Side Hustle Builder plan to create a simple email-based service that now brings in around $2,700 each month.
success_stories.content:
When Lena left her full-time teaching job to be home with her two kids, she knew she still wanted to contribute financially. The problem was that traditional part-time work didn’t fit around school pickups and a toddler who refused to nap on schedule.

She discovered our Email Freedom Builder program and enrolled using the Side Hustle Builder plan. For the first two weeks, she focused on the step-by-step modules: clarifying her offer, writing her first 7-day email sequence, and setting up a simple landing page. She scheduled all of this between 9–11am and a few evenings after bedtime.

By week four, Lena had her first three paying clients for a done-for-you email welcome series. Within three months, she was averaging $2,700 per month in revenue, working between 22–28 hours per week. She keeps Mondays and Fridays mostly free for family time and batches her client work on Tuesdays–Thursdays.

“Knowing exactly what to do with the hours I do have has been life-changing,” Lena says. “I’m present with my kids, and I still feel like I have a career I’m proud of.”

success_stories.title: Side-Hustle Dad Replaces Car Payment in 60 Days
success_stories.headline: Parent of three earns around $3,200/month promoting affiliate offers in 20–25 hours per week
success_stories.summary: Michael used the Affiliate Authority Sprint program and a Quickstart Pro plan to turn product recommendations into a consistent affiliate income stream that covers his family’s car payment and daycare bill.
success_stories.content:
Michael works full time in IT and has three kids under ten. When unexpected daycare costs hit, he needed a flexible way to earn more without sacrificing evenings and weekends with his family.

He joined our Affiliate Authority Sprint program through the Quickstart Coaching Pro plan. In his first week, he used the coaching calls to narrow down a profitable niche: tools and software for remote workers. He followed the program’s templates to create a simple review newsletter and a one-page “tools we actually use” guide.

For the first month, Michael committed 20–25 hours per week, mostly in the early mornings before the kids were up. He focused on publishing one useful piece of content per week and building his email list.

After 60 days, his affiliate commissions averaged about $3,200 per month. “We paid off a car loan early, and now that money goes straight to our savings,” he explains. “The structure of the sprint and having clear weekly targets made it possible to fit this around family life.”

success_stories.title: From Burned-Out Manager to Flexible Email Strategist
success_stories.headline: Single mom transitions from corporate to earning $4,100/month working 25–30 hours weekly
success_stories.summary: Alejandra left a stressful management role and used our programs to build a client roster as an email marketing strategist, hitting roughly $4,100/month within six months.
success_stories.content:
Alejandra spent a decade as a retail store manager before deciding the schedule was no longer compatible with raising her eight-year-old daughter on her own. She needed something more flexible, but she worried about giving up a stable paycheck.

She started with the Quickstart Coaching Plus plan and the Email Freedom Builder program. With guidance from her coach, she positioned herself as an “on-demand email strategist” for local service businesses. The training modules helped her design a clear offer, write persuasive email sequences, and price her packages confidently.

For the first three months, she devoted 25–30 hours per week, mostly during school hours. By month four, Alejandra had signed four recurring clients and was averaging $4,100 in monthly revenue. She now schedules all calls between 10am and 2pm and never misses school events.

“My daughter noticed first,” she says. “She said, ‘You’re not tired all the time anymore.’ That alone made the transition worth it—$4,000 a month is just the bonus.”

success_stories.title: Evenings-Only Client Support Side Gig
success_stories.headline: Dad of a newborn earns around $2,300/month offering client care services in 15–18 hours weekly
success_stories.summary: With a newborn at home, Jared built a lean client support service that fits into short evening blocks.
success_stories.content:
Jared and his partner welcomed their first baby just as his workplace announced a restructuring. Not wanting to gamble on overtime or extra shifts, he decided to build a side income from home.

Using the Client Care Concierge program with the Quickstart Coaching Lite plan, he learned how to set up simple client communication systems and onboarding checklists for online coaches. He committed to 15–18 hours per week, almost entirely in the evenings after bedtime.

Within three months, he was bringing in around $2,300 per month. Although he chose to keep the workload light for now, he has a clear roadmap for scaling when the baby’s schedule becomes more predictable.

“I wanted something that didn’t require me to be on live calls all day,” Jared explains. “This model lets me deliver great service while still being present for my family.”

success_stories.title: School-Hour Social Media Studio
success_stories.headline: Stay-at-home mom turns a love of social media into $2,900/month working school hours only
success_stories.summary: Samira used the Social Content Mini-Studio program to start managing content for local businesses while her kids are at school.
success_stories.content:
Samira always enjoyed creating short-form videos and Instagram stories, but she never thought of it as a business. With two kids in elementary school, she had a consistent 4–5 hour block most weekdays and wanted to use it for something meaningful.

She joined the Social Content Mini-Studio program with the Self-Study Starter plan. The modules walked her through packaging her skills, pricing monthly content packages, and creating a simple prospecting system. Even without live coaching, she followed the checklists and sample outreach scripts closely.

Within four months, Samira had signed three small local clients and one online coach, averaging about $2,900 per month in revenue. She works between 18–24 hours each week and completely protects weekends for family.

“Instead of scrolling social media, I get paid to create content that actually helps businesses grow,” she says. “And I’m always done before school pickup.”

success_stories.title: Student Earns $1,500/Month Editing Newsletters
success_stories.headline: College student covers rent with part-time email editing work
success_stories.summary: Rafa applied lessons from Email Freedom Builder to offer editing and light strategy support to creators who write weekly newsletters.
success_stories.content:
Rafa is a full-time university student studying communications. Instead of taking on another campus job, he wanted a way to work remotely and build skills he could use after graduation.

After enrolling in the Email Freedom Builder program with the Quickstart Coaching Lite plan, he realized there was demand for someone to clean up copy and optimize subject lines for busy newsletter creators. He pitched a few small creators using outreach templates from the program and landed his first client within two weeks.

Today, Rafa earns about $1,500 per month editing and lightly optimizing weekly emails for four clients. He works 10–15 hours per week and schedules everything around his class timetable.

“Having control over my schedule means I can block off time during exams and then ramp back up afterward,” he shares. “It’s more flexible than any on-campus job I’ve had.”

success_stories.title: Retired Teacher Builds a $2,600/Month Course Library
success_stories.headline: Retiree monetizes decades of experience with digital products
success_stories.summary: Nora used Passive Product Lab to turn her classroom systems into practical mini-courses for new teachers.
success_stories.content:
Nora retired from teaching but missed helping new educators get their footing. She didn’t want to go back to full-time work, yet she saw how many new teachers were struggling each year.

She joined Passive Product Lab on the Growth Accelerator plan to learn how to package her know-how into digital products. Following the program, she created checklists, mini-trainings, and templates that solved common classroom problems. She launched her first product with a simple email sequence and a few posts in educator communities.

Within six months, her small product library was bringing in about $2,600 each month. She spends 12–18 hours per week answering student questions, updating content, and planning new resources.

“The best part is reading messages from new teachers who say, ‘I used your system and finally had a smooth week,’” Nora says. “The income is wonderful, but the impact matters even more.”

success_stories.title: Weekend Creator Reaches $2,200/Month
success_stories.headline: Full-time nurse builds a weekend-only content side business
success_stories.summary: Amina used the Weekend Side Hustle Starter track to build a low-pressure content and consulting offer that fits around shift work.
success_stories.content:
Amina works rotating shifts as a nurse and didn’t see how a side business could possibly fit around her unpredictable schedule. She wanted something she could mostly batch on weekends.

The Weekend Side Hustle Starter program showed her how to batch social content and create a tiny consulting offer that didn’t require daily check-ins. She enrolled using the Webinar Special Starter plan after attending a free overview session.

Now she spends 8–12 hours most weekends creating content, responding to leads, and delivering a handful of consulting sessions each month. Her side business brings in around $2,200 per month and has helped her pay down debt without cutting back on rest days.

“I used to dread picking up extra shifts,” Amina says. “Now I have another option that doesn’t burn me out.”

success_stories.title: From Overtime to Online Clients
success_stories.headline: Full-time project manager replaces overtime pay with $3,000/month in freelance work
success_stories.summary: Devon used the Freelance Launch Lite program to build a consistent client base and stop relying on overtime income.
success_stories.content:
Devon used to take on every overtime shift offered just to stay ahead of bills. The trade-off was constant stress and zero free time. He wanted a way to earn extra that didn’t involve living at the office.

After enrolling in Freelance Launch Lite with the Quickstart Coaching Plus plan, Devon discovered he could repurpose his project management skills. He started offering implementation and task management support to online business owners.

Within four months, he was bringing in about $3,000 in monthly freelance income while working 12–18 hours per week. He no longer signs up for overtime and instead uses that time to develop his client base.

“The checklist for landing my first three clients was exactly what I needed,” Devon shares. “Once I followed it, the momentum kicked in fast.”

success_stories.title: Engineer Builds a $5,200/Month Coaching Practice
success_stories.headline: Full-time engineer turns expertise into a leveraged coaching business
success_stories.summary: Claire used Advanced Coach Scaler to transition from 1:1 mentoring into a structured part-time coaching business.
success_stories.content:
Claire loved mentoring junior engineers at work but didn’t see a clear path to turning that into a business. She worried that coaching would require endless live calls.

With the Advanced Coach Scaler program and Premium Coaching & Implementation plan, she learned how to structure a group coaching curriculum, set boundaries around her availability, and build a scalable enrollment process.

In less than a year, Claire’s part-time coaching practice reached about $5,200 in monthly revenue. She devotes 15–20 hours each week to running group calls, creating resources, and marketing through her email list.

“I didn’t have to quit my job to get started,” she explains. “Now I’m giving myself the option to go full-time on my own terms.”

success_stories.title: Night-Shift Mom Builds a $3,300/Month Email + Social Hybrid Business
success_stories.headline: Parent working night shifts adds $3,300/month from a flexible online business in 24–30 hours weekly
success_stories.summary: Olivia combined the Email Freedom Builder and Social Content Mini-Studio strategies to create a hybrid service for local wellness brands.
success_stories.content:
Olivia works nights as a respiratory therapist and wanted an income stream that could eventually let her transition off the most demanding shifts. With two kids at home, she needed a schedule that worked around both family and sleep.

She started with the Quickstart Coaching Plus plan and focused on the Email Freedom Builder curriculum, then later added elements from the Social Content Mini-Studio program. The result was a hybrid offer: simple email campaigns and social posts for local wellness brands.

Within six months, Olivia was bringing in about $3,300 per month, working 24–30 hours per week. She batches most of her work on her off-days and uses a shared content calendar to stay organized.

“The biggest shift was realizing I didn’t have to choose between email or social—I could combine them into one clear package,” she says. “Now I can see a realistic path out of night shifts.”

success_stories.title: Retired Accountant Turns Templates Into $1,800/Month
success_stories.headline: Retiree sells simple financial tracking templates from home
success_stories.summary: Henry leveraged Passive Product Lab to package his favorite spreadsheets into easy-to-use templates for small business owners.
success_stories.content:
Henry spent his career as an accountant and loved helping small business owners understand their numbers. In retirement, he wanted to keep using his skills without taking on full bookkeeping clients.

Through Passive Product Lab and the Self-Study Starter plan, Henry learned how to package his personal spreadsheet systems into templates with simple video walkthroughs. He launched his first product to a small email list and a few niche Facebook groups.

Today his templates generate around $1,800 per month in mostly passive sales. He spends 8–12 hours per week answering customer questions and updating his products.

“It feels good to still be useful, but on my own schedule,” Henry says. “I can take a week off to travel and the sales still come in.”
